heading: Improved Medicare prescription drug plan and MA–PD plan complaint system
label: 1395w–154 Improved Medicare prescription drug plan and MA–PD plan complaint system
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act, and not as part of the Social Security Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall develop and maintain a complaint system, that is widely known and easy to use, to collect and maintain information on MA–PD plan and prescription drug plan complaints that are received (including by telephone, letter, e-mail, or any other means) by the Secretary (including by a regional office of the Department of Health and Human Services, the Medicare Beneficiary Ombudsman, a subcontractor, a carrier, a fiscal intermediary, and a Medicare administrative contractor under ) through the date on which the complaint is resolved. The system shall be able to report and initiate appropriate interventions and monitoring based on substantial complaints and to guide quality improvement.section 1395kk–1 of this title

children.heading: Model electronic complaint form
children.label: b Model electronic complaint form
children.text: The Secretary shall develop a model electronic complaint form to be used for reporting plan complaints under the system. Such form shall be prominently displayed on the front page of the Medicare.gov Internet website and on the Internet website of the Medicare Beneficiary Ombudsman.

children.heading: Annual reports by the Secretary
children.label: c Annual reports by the Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall submit to Congress annual reports on the system. Such reports shall include an analysis of the number and types of complaints reported in the system, geographic variations in such complaints, the timeliness of agency or plan responses to such complaints, and the resolution of such complaints.

children.heading: MA–PD plan
children.label: 1 MA–PD plan
children.text: The term “MA–PD plan” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–151(a)(9) of this title

children.heading: Prescription drug plan
children.label: 2 Prescription drug plan
children.text: The term “prescription drug plan” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–151(a)(14) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: System
children.label: 4 System
children.text: The term “system” means the plan complaint system developed and maintained under subsection (a).
